name: Whamon Perfect

signature_move.name: Tidal Wave
signature_move.description: Generates a gigantic tidal wave, destroying everything.

description: Current Before ⇨ Japanese Living in the deep oceans of the Net , it is a Digimon of large build. Its enormousness is of the highest class in the Digital World. Due to that enormousness, it carries a volume of data that couldn't be processed by a normal computer. Although it has been possible to confirm it as the same species as those in File Island 's coastal waters, this Whamon, which lives off of Folder Continent 's coast, and whose appearance is totally the same, has surpassed the previous in both offensive ability and vitality, and accomplished an evolution to Perfect . Its Special Move is generating a gigantic tidal wave, destroying everything ( Tidal Wave ).
